description: Welcome home to the heart of Oak Hill with no HOA, no restrictions, and no renovation required!  Recent updates include fresh paint with repaired walls throughout creating a blank canvas, combined the his and hers closets into one large primary walk in, added updated flooring in primary bedroom, updated light fixtures throughout, and added a large walk in storage closet at the base of the stairs. This home offers a functional layout designed to take advantage of its Hill Country setting. The main living, dining, and kitchen spaces are intentionally located upstairs, opening to a sleek aluminum deck with elevated views through the treetops.   Downstairs, the primary suite functions as a true retreat with a spa style bathroom and direct access to a private covered patio. FOUR outdoor living areas extend the usable space of the home and create flexibility for entertaining, relaxing, or simply enjoying the setting.  A two car carport with a custom rust colored garage door adds a modern architectural touch, while the climate controlled chicken shed offers optional utility or creative space without impacting livability.

Immaculate, beautiful, quiet, 1 story house that is move in ready! This open floor plan encompasses four spacious bedrooms with plenty of room for study, sleep and storage. A sleek and stylish gourmet kitchen flows through to the open dining and living areas. The master bedroom is complete with a walk-in closet and shower. Private back yard views with no neighbors behind this house. Perfect for anyone, positioned close to ABIA, just minutes away from downtown Austin.

The Bernini is an open concept, split bedroom floor plan that features spacious areas for relaxation and play. The living, dining, and kitchen space have soaring ceilings that meet the loft area on the second floor, both make for great spots to entertain. The private secondary bedrooms are a true retreat, with one at the front of the home and two additional upstairs. A centrally located study ensures privacy, yet convenience to the kitchen and living space. Storage abounds in this home, with an extra deep garage bay, a wall of shelves in the laundry, and oversized storage closet near the front of the home. Finally, a gorgeous primary bed and bath acts as the perfect place to unwind. 

Optional upgrades include- 
- Enhanced extended outdoor living
-Extended Primary Suite

Beautiful large country setting home. Master is down. Amazing kitchen is complete with stone fireplace. Second fireplace in living area. Lots of space. Large deck for sitting outside and enjoying the tranquility of the hill country.

description: Stylishly updated home in prime NW Austin neighborhood just over a mile from the new Apple campus! Nearly every major feature has been recently updated including the roof, interior and exterior paint, flooring and lighting. Gorgeous quartz countertops in the kitchen and bathrooms along with stunning tile surrounds and flooring in both bathrooms. Popular Texas limestone exterior and matching floor-to-ceiling fireplace in the family room. The layout is perfect for entertaining, with two large living areas off the open kitchen downstairs and an additional spacious living area upstairs. Abundant natural light fills the home through large windows, and all bedrooms are oversized with walk-in closets. Step outside onto the back patio shaded by mature live oaks overlooking the lush, spacious backyard. Enjoy walkable access to two neighborhood parks with amenities including a Jr. Olympic pool (heated in winter), tennis and pickleball courts, basketball, sand volleyball, playgrounds, sports fields, and scenic hike-and-bike trails. The community also hosts fun events throughout the year like egg hunts, crawfish boils, Rattan Fest, and Holiday in the Park! Zoned to highly rated Round Rock ISD schools, including an elementary school right in the neighborhood. Just minutes from Hwy 183, Parmer, SH 45, and 620, this home offers unbeatable convenience near major employers, shopping, dining, and just 10 minutes from The Domain - Austin’s vibrant second downtown.

description: Nestled in the heart of downtown Austin, The Westgate Tower offers a one-of-a-kind retreat with timeless character and modern comfort. Designed by famed architect Edward Durell Stone, this residence carries a legacy of mid-century modern elegance. Directly across from the State Capitol and overlooking the Governor’s Mansion, the home is filled with light and charm. With 1,014 square feet, two bedrooms, and two bathrooms, every detail feels intentional. The five balconies, each with large sliding glass doors, invite the outdoors in, framing sweeping views of downtown and the Hill Country. Warm hardwood floors add a touch of warmth throughout the space. Residents enjoy a rooftop pool and lounge area, a fitness center, laundry facilities, and dedicated garage parking with additional storage available. Life at the Westgate blends thoughtful design, peaceful living, and Austin’s vibrant energy into a truly rare combination.

description: Fly Tour™ Video included: watch for a full walkthrough! Modern, move-in ready condo thanks to major 2025 renovation: Quartz counters, stainless steel appliances, shaker-style cabinets, Mohawk rigid LVF flooring, new ceramic tile, fresh paint, and much more (see document attached to MLS for list of renovations). Beautiful gated oasis just blocks from UT & 1 mile from Downtown Austin! Rare opportunity to own a ground-floor end unit 2-bed condo with no shared side walls—only units above. This light-filled condo features walk-in closets, in-unit laundry, wood-burning fireplace, and a covered patio accessible from both bedrooms with a pleasant neighborhood view. Located in a highly walkable (Walk Score 82) and bikeable (Bike Score 88) neighborhood with several parks and trails nearby. Ceiling fans in both bedrooms & living room. UT Shuttle picks up right in front; CapMetro bus lines on Guadalupe & Duval are within walking distance. Two reserved parking spaces (17, 35) included (one covered, one uncovered). Pet-friendly HOA, & HOA dues include trash, security service (courtesy patrol service performed nightly on the property), insurance on the structure (bare walls coverage), & common area maintenance. Well-lit complex with 3 gated entrances and a controlled-access courtyard featuring a shaded lounge, gas grill, fire pit, tables, chairs, 2 bike racks, and mailboxes. Brick & Hardie Plank siding. New roof & gutters ~7 years ago. These are all within a 5 minute walk: Speedway Market, Crown & Anchor Pub, Taco Joint, Posse East Grill, Clown Dog Bikes, Little Barber, & Vaquero Taquero. Whether you’re looking for a great investment or an excellent central Austin location to call home, this is a wonderful opportunity!

description: A Fresh Take on Style – Fully Remodeled & Move-In Ready! From top to bottom, this gem shines—literally! Gold accents add a luxurious touch throughout the home, creating stylish pops of elegance in every room. The kitchen is a showstopper, featuring a brand new gas stove, refrigerator, and dishwasher, all set against modern finishes that blend beauty with function. Gleaming new laminate wood flooring runs seamlessly throughout, and all-new light fixtures give the home a warm, upscale glow—like your own little piece of paradise. Step outside to a huge, fully fenced backyard, perfect for entertaining, gardening, or simply relaxing. Located in a prime spot, you’re just minutes from the best dining, nightlife, and culture Austin has to offer This stunning home has been completely refreshed inside and out, featuring brand-new interior and exterior paint for a crisp, clean look. Step inside to discover thoughtful updates throughout, including all-new countertops, a fully remodeled bathroom with elegant subway tile, and sleek black-and-white finishes that feel straight out of a design magazine. The living room is a showpiece, anchored by a dramatic center beam and a striking ceiling fan. A cozy fireplace with a custom wood mantle adds the perfect touch of warmth and character. Enjoy the brand-new patio door that leads out to your spacious backyard—ideal for entertaining or simply soaking in the sunshine. With every detail carefully considered, this home blends comfort and style in all the right ways. Come see it for yourself—this one won’t last long!

Gorgeous home in a Gated Community in South East Austin. This home has 4 bedrooms, with 3 full bathrooms.  The downstairs room is perfect as a second master, office or studio. Custom white kitchen cabinets, high-end finishes, granite counter tops, and wood tile complete the downstairs, and lend a spa like feel.  The master bedroom is oversized with copious amounts of space for a king bed, and more.  The master bathroom has  large soaking tub, walk-in shower, and dual vanities with a large walk-in closet.

This charming 2-bedroom, 1.5-bathroom home is just minutes from everything you love about Austin, including Barton Springs, Zilker Park, the Greenbelt, and all the fun along South Lamar and SoCo. Whether you're craving a morning run by the water, a bite at a local food truck, or a quick trip downtown, this location can't be beat.Step inside to an open and bright living space with stylish concrete floors downstairs and brand-new flooring upstairsno carpet anywhere! The updated kitchen features quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, and fresh cabinetry, making it a great spot to cook or host friends. Upstairs, you'll find two cozy bedrooms and a full bathroom with clean, modern finishes. Instead of a typical patio, this unit includes a small attached private yardperfect for relaxing outdoors, grilling, or giving your pet a bit of space to roam.You'll also love how easy it is to explore everything Austin has to offer. From major festivals like SXSW and Austin City Limits to weekend markets, live music, and food truck parks, there's always something going on just minutes from your front door. With quick access to downtown and major roads, getting anywhere in the city is a breeze.This quiet fourplex is pet-friendly too, so your furry companion is welcome to enjoy the space with you. If you've been looking for a great spot in one of Austin's most iconic neighborhoods, this is it. Come experience what makes Zilker living so special!

description:
The advertised rate of $4,048/month is the lowest available price, based on a 1 month(s) stay with a move-in date of November 3, 2026.

Rates vary depending on the duration of stay, season, and other parameters. For exact pricing and additional pricing components, please visit our website and enter your desired move-in and move-out dates. The rate is applicable when billed upfront; it can be higher if billed in multiple payments.
Feel at home in this 2-bedroom apartment, the "Kaleido House", located just .44 miles from Zilker Park and Barton Springs Pool. This 1008 sq ft apartment features tall ceilings and colorful decor.
The kitchen is fully equipped for cooking, and the recently redone bathroom features a double vanity and soaking tub. Other amenities include fresh coffee (organic local Ruta Maya) and tea fixings, a washer/dryer and detergent, bath and beach towels, and a Britta water filter. There are smart TVs in the living room and master bedroom with antennas.
A propane grill and dining table are available on the deck. If you plan on bringing a pet, a $50 pet fee will be charged for shorter stays and $100 for monthly stays. Pets are expected to be kept off the furniture and in a crate or behind a gate in the kitchen when left unattended. Crates, gates, and couch covers are available upon request.
Enjoy easy walking access to many of Austin's famous restaurants as well as the outdoor paradise that is Zilker Park. Whole Foods world headquarters and Trader Joe's are approximately 2 miles away, and several smaller convenience stores are blocks away.
The City of Austin enforces a 10:30 PM noise curfew. If a complaint is received, the issue will be addressed with the primary renter, and a second complaint may result in immediate eviction without refund. Smoking or vaping is only allowed outside using the ashtray provided. A cleaning fee of $115 applies for shorter stays and $200 for 30+ stays.

One block from Barton Springs, building is wired for Google Fiber, exterior storage closet, on site coin operated laundry. Freshly painted and ready to move in.

Electric is only tenant paid utility.

The advertised rate of $4,024/month is the lowest available price, based on a 30 day(s) stay with a move-in date of August 11, 2026.

Rates vary depending on the duration of stay, season, and other parameters. For exact pricing and additional pricing components, please visit our website and enter your desired move-in and move-out dates. The rate is applicable when billed upfront; it can be higher if billed in multiple payments.
Feel at home in this wheelchair-accessible 2-bedroom duplex with an entry ramp, roll-in shower, and open space under the sink in the kitchen and bath.
This approximately 1000 sq ft duplex can comfortably sleep up to 4 guests. The open living/dining/kitchen area features windows along the front for natural light. The updated kitchen is fully equipped for cooking and includes fresh organic locally roasted coffee beans, a grinder, filters, a drip thermos coffee pot, tea bags, sugar, cream, Splenda, a Britta water pitcher, oil, basic condiments, and some spices and herbs. There is a gas grill on the partially covered deck, along with tools and grate covers in the kitchen. Linens and towels are provided, and there is a washer and dryer with all necessary supplies available for guest use. There are grab bars in the roll-in shower and at the toilet. Smart TVs with access to local channels via antenna and high-speed protected wireless internet are available in the living room and master bedroom.
Pets are welcome with a fee of $50.
Located in the Barton Hills area, this property is perfect for exploring Austin, with easy access to restaurants, shops, and entertainment. It is just 0.44 miles from Zilker Park, home to Barton Springs Pool. A bus stop is about 2/3 mile away on Barton Springs Rd, offering access to public transport. Hike and bike trails provide another way to get around Austin, and Barton Springs Bike Rentals can deliver bikes to the property.
For bookings over 28 days, the cleaning fee is $200 and the pet fee is $100.

Rates vary depending on the duration of stay, season, and other parameters. For exact pricing and additional pricing components, please visit our website and enter your desired move-in and move-out dates. The rate is applicable when billed upfront; it can be higher if billed in multiple payments.
Feel at home in this beautiful 2-bedroom apartment. It features a remodeled kitchen, huge windows in the living room, a beautiful patio, and a dining area.
This exquisite 2-bedroom, 1-bath furnished apartment offers modern comfort and a tranquil, treehouse-like ambiance. The spacious living room is adorned with massive windows that flood the space with natural light, creating a bright and airy atmosphere. The fully remodeled kitchen boasts sleek, contemporary finishes and all the amenities needed to prepare your favorite meals. The primary bedroom features a luxurious king-size bed, while the second bedroom offers a cozy queen-size bed. The bathroom is tastefully designed with modern fixtures and a relaxing atmosphere. The curated modern decor throughout the apartment complements the natural surroundings, creating a harmonious and stylish retreat.
Two parking spaces are available.
Located just 3 miles from downtown and the convention center, 20 minutes from the Circuit of the Americas, and 1.5 miles to Barton Springs and Zilker Park, this apartment is also just two blocks from an entrance to The Barton Creek Greenbelt. You're also only a block or so off of South Lamar and several of Austin's favorite places to eat and drink, such as Kerbey Lane Cafe, East Side King, The Soup Peddler, Baker's Street Pub, Michi Ramen, and Torchy's Tacos.
See house guidelines posted in property.
Includes a dedicated work-from-home space.

description: Tucked into one of Austin’s most sought-after neighborhoods, 810 Ethel Street is a thoughtfully renovated Zilker bungalow that blends classic charm and character with modern updates. This 832 square foot two bedroom, one bath home was taken down to the studs in 2012 and rebuilt with care, including all new plumbing, electrical, roof, drywall, kitchen, bathroom, refinished original hardwood floors, added tankless water heater, and replaced sewer line—giving you the feel of a much newer home while keeping the character that makes Zilker so special.  Set on a generous lot just shy of 5,800 square feet, the property offers plenty of room to expand, create an outdoor retreat, or simply enjoy the space and privacy that’s becoming harder to find this close to downtown.  The location is hard to beat. Just minutes from Zilker Park, Barton Springs, downtown Austin, and some of the city’s best restaurants, coffee shops, and local favorites, you’ll be right in the middle of everything that makes Austin… Austin. Whether you’re looking for a move-in ready home, a long-term investment, fantastic rental revenue or a prime lot in an unbeatable neighborhood, 810 Ethel delivers that opportunity in the heart of Zilker.

description:
Close. Comfortable. Connected.

Brio Apartments offers luxuriously comfortable and connected living, minutes from Austin, Texas' largest employers, and most desirable attractions. Experience all the modern amenities of a garden-style community, while being within easy reach of the hiking and biking paths that wind around nearby Lake Pflugerville and the Northeast Metropolitan Park. Just a short drive away from the legendary nearby city lights, music, nightlife, and famous foodie finds of Austin, TX, and a short commute away from the biggest tech companies in Austin. Brio's thoughtfully designed and technology-enhanced apartment homes set the stage for a rewarding indoor-outdoor lifestyle, while helping you find the time to enjoy it.

description: This 1285 square foot single family home has 4 bedrooms and 2.0 bathrooms. This home is located at 2205 Spring Creek Dr, Austin, TX 78704.

Hidden away in a uniquely peaceful neighborhood in North Austin, Lenox Grand's one-, two-, and three-bedroom homes blend tranquility with contemporary interior design. Minutes from the area's best shopping, dining, and nightlife at The Domain, Shops at Tech Ridge, and La Frontera, you will discover a lifestyle that balances excitement, serenity, and convenience. Despite its proximity to iconic local attractions and major tech hubs, Lenox Grand remains a relaxing enclave outside the Austin bustle, where residents enjoy a picturesque boardwalk and mature, welcoming oak trees.We are now offering self-guided tours! Visit our property website directly to schedule your self-guided tour on your own terms! No matter what option you choose, our team will be here to help answer any questions you may have.

description: TOUR YOUR WAY! We have a tour to fit your needs- virtual, self-guided, or agent-guided. Your next home awaits at MAA South Lamar in Austin, TX. The spacious studio, one-bedroom, and two-bedroom homes offer modern fixtures, granite countertops, and washer/dryer units. Some apartments have concrete floors and extra-large balconies. Take in the sunset on the rooftop deck with views of downtown Austin. Enjoy three resort-style pools, or entertain guests at our poolside alfresco-style kitchen. Work up a sweat in one of the two 24-hour fitness centers. We also offer MAA Smart Homes as an amenity at MAA South Lamar. With remote access, 24/7 customer care, self-monitored security, and smart notifications, you can get real-time information about your new home with. Our community is about one mile from Lady Bird Lake and Zilker Park. We're also just minutes from downtown Austin, The University of Texas, and Central Market.

description: Thoughtfully designed custom-built modern craftsman dream home offering beauty and practicality at every turn. Set on a generous corner lot, the home greets you with a wide wraparound porch and natural stone exterior that feel both inviting and timeless. Inside, wide-plank oak floors, tall ceilings, and abundant natural light create a calm and connected living space. A private study with walls of windows offers the perfect setting for work or reflection, while the open-concept living and dining area flows easily into a stunning kitchen featuring quartz countertops, a farmhouse sink, custom tile, and soft-close cabinetry. French doors lead to a covered patio with wood-planked ceilings, ideal for relaxing or entertaining outdoors. The home includes two full primary suites, one on each level, each with spacious layouts and spa-like baths with soaking tubs and double vanities. An oversized three-car garage with a workshop/gym and custom loft offering exceptional flexibility for creative projects or storage needs. Located in the heart of Lake Travis with access to walkable top-rated schools and everyday conveniences, this is a home that feels as good as it looks.

This 12 unit apartment complex is in a quiet, central neighborhood, very close to downtown and wonderful outdoor areas like the trail at Lady Bird Lake, Zilker Park, and Barton Springs Pool. Lots of restaurants and entertainment venues are within walking distance. This one bedroom, one bath apartment is upstairs, no shared walls. It has been completely remodeled and offers all hardwood floors, high efficiency central air/heat, recessed can lighting on dimmer switches, granite counter tops in the kitchen with stainless appliances including dishwasher, microwave, disposal, gas cooking. The bathroom has a tub/shower with all tile surround, marble floor and marble counter tops. There are ceiling fans in all the rooms with double-pane windows. There is a laundry room on site and covered bike storage. Please call Doug or respond to this ad for an appointment to view. Will be available for February 1, 2026 move in.

Owner pays gas, water/wastewater, trash and recycling. Tenant is responsible for electricity and cable/internet. No smoking, no pets and no short term rentals allowed at this property.
One car per apartment.

Available for May 31st 2022 move in. Immaculately maintained corner lot home in popular Maple Run! Many upgraded features including: canned lighting, vaulted ceilings, double pane, energy efficient windows, laundry room w/ sink. Laminate wood-style floors and tile--no carpet. Stainless appliances including convection oven, OTR outside venting microwave and side-by-side refrigerator. Application fees are non-refundable, admin fee due only if you're approved, owner seeking best qualified tenant. No restricted dog breeds. Please see our online application for our screening criteria and a list of restricted dog breeds.

Tenant pays for all utilities, grounds care and pest control.

description:
Set your pace at Opal Point at Kyle Kyle's newest luxury community with rents you can actually afford.

Set your own pace with Opal Point at Kyle, a modern new vision for upscale apartment living offering a lock & leave lifestyle in Kyle, TX. Our stylish, sophisticated apartment homes present a contemporary living experience with refined elegance that you won't find anywhere else. Designed to craft a harmonious balance for your live-work-play attitude, life could not get any better than at Opal Point. With our exceptional collection of one, two and three bedroom layouts, find the apartment that finally feels like home. Every home features smart locks & thermostats, plank flooring, stainless appliances, and on-demand WiFi from day one. Every aspect of the community has been carefully curated with the chic and modern details that exemplify luxury. From the warm plank flooring and soft accent hues to the cozy neutrals in the interior color palette. Couple that with energy efficient appliances and smart home features, including smart locks and thermostats, leak detectors and on-demand community WiFi from the first day of your move-in, you'll understand how no detail has been missed. Find a new level of living when you come home to Opal Point. Experience the lifestyle you crave with access to top dining, shopping and entertainment options while being close enough to get to Downtown Austin in a pinch. We can't wait to welcome you home to Opal Point at Kyle! Ask about our Essential Housing Program available for qualifying households. Ask about reduced rates for educators, healthcare workers, and first responders through our Employer Partnership Program. Tour today your smartest move starts here.

CRESTVIEW TOWNHOUSE LOADED WITH EXTRAS AND BUILT TO THE NEWEST ENERGY CODE!  WALKING DISTANCE TO METRO RAIL AND OTHER HOT SPOTS IN THE AREA.  Downstairs you have wood floors, island kitchen - very open floor plan.  Small back yard plus 1 car garage and covered carport.  Enjoy the many pocket parks and dog park located in the community.

Wonderful home in Milwood in excellent move-in condition, but ready for a refresh. 100% tile throughout, huge beautiful yard, spacious bedrooms. Formal Living/Dining, Family room with fireplace, enormous master suite with adjacent bedroom-sized sitting area/flex space. Big bedrooms with good closets. Big shady yard with trees and two storage units. One of the largest 1-stories in Milwood.

description: Beautifully updated two-story home on a spacious corner lot in the established Lamplight Village community. This property offers three bedrooms, three full bathrooms, and a bright, open layout with modern finishes throughout. The main living area features a stone fireplace, abundant natural light, and French doors leading to the backyard. The fully remodeled kitchen includes quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, new cabinetry, and a breakfast bar.  All bathrooms have been tastefully renovated with contemporary tile and upgraded fixtures. Additional improvements include new flooring, fresh interior and exterior paint, updated lighting, and a recently installed roof. The large fenced backyard provides mature trees, ample space for outdoor living, and a private setting ideal for entertaining.  Located just minutes from The Domain, major employers, and key commuter routes, this home combines comfort, style, and convenience. Zoned to Pflugerville ISD.

Gated condominium community with pool, package facility, and gym. Residents pay rent and water, electric is separate with the city. No added fees & carport included! This condo features an open, spacious layout with washer/dryer connections in bathroom and lots of natural light. Short driving distance to the domain, shopping and many restaurants.

description: Perched atop a hill overlooking the city, the Windsor South Lamar apartments in south Austin are nestled in the heart of one of the city's most unique and thriving locations. Less than a mile from Lady Bird Lake and downtown Austin, in the coveted Zilker Neighborhood, Windsor South Lamar offer no shortage of ways to spend your days and nights! Feed your musical taste buds at the historic Broken Spoke, quench your thirst and listen to live music at The Saxon Pub, catch a move at Alamo Draft House Cinema, find your inner Zen at Define Spa, jog around Lady Bird Lake, or take a refreshing dip into Barton Springs. Whether you're new to town or an ATX native, Windsor South Lamar makes it easier than ever to enjoy the laid back, Austin lifestyle.

description: This family friendly home features five bedrooms, three full baths and a bonus room.. The master bedroom is on the first floor. A bedroom located in a separate wing on the first floor with a full bath is perfect for guests. The kitchen includes a large island, generous counter space and walk in pantry. An expansive dining room leads to outdoor entertaining. The great room is ideal for family gatherings. Private master bedroom with bath including generous storage space, large walk-in shower, double vanity, enclosed water room and all-season closet. Upstairs you will find three large bedrooms, two with walk in closets and a bonus room perfect for game night or media.

description:
Live in the heart of South Austin at 4361 South Congress Ave #206 a sleek and modern 2-bedroom, 2-bath condo just minutes from downtown. This light-filled unit features an open-concept layout with high ceilings, laminate floors, and large windows that let in plenty of natural light. The contemporary kitchen is equipped with washer, dryer, stainless steel appliances, and quartz countertops perfect for entertaining.

Enjoy your morning coffee or evening wine on the private balcony overlooking the vibrant SoCo district. The spacious bedroom offers a walk-in closet, and the bathroom is clean and modern with upscale finishes. 

Located in the coveted Public Lofts community, you'll have access to top-notch amenities including a rooftop heated pool, fitness center, yoga studio, dog run, rooftop terrace, and more. Just steps away from restaurants, breweries, coffee shops, and boutiques and with easy access to I-35 and Hwy 71 this location can't be beat.

Perfect for professionals, creatives, and anyone looking to enjoy the best of Austin living.Private garage parking! Tenant must make an appointment with the HOA to move in and pay a small refundable deposit.

description: Charming single-story home on a cul-de-sac street in NW Austin! This beautiful single-story home sits on an oversized quarter-acre+ lot just blocks from the neighborhood HOA park and pool. Major improvements have already been taken care of, including a recent roof, gutters, exterior paint, water heater, and a stunning primary bathroom renovation. The stylish entry, featuring recently installed tile, opens to a spacious living area with vaulted ceilings, laminate wood floors, and a striking floor-to-ceiling brick and wood fireplace. The kitchen is open and bright with white cabinetry, quartz countertops, recessed lighting, and flows seamlessly into two dining areas - perfect for everyday living and entertaining. Both bathrooms have been upgraded with quartz countertops, and the remodeled primary bath showcases a large walk-in shower with a full-height subway tile surround. Additional highlights include a finished garage and a covered back patio with ceiling fan that overlooks a huge backyard - ready for outdoor living, gardening, or play. Located in highly rated Round Rock ISD, with an elementary school within walking distance. Enjoy the wonderful amenities just blocks away, including a pool, tennis/pickleball courts, playgrounds, and a sports field. In the heart of Austin’s thriving tech corridor, you’re only 2 miles from the new Apple campus and just minutes to major highways, employers, shopping, dining, and The Domain - Austin’s second downtown - just 10 minutes away!

detailedPetPolicy/general: A maximum of two (2) animals per household will be permitted with a signed Animal Addendum, a $250 Non-Refundable Pet Fee and a Monthly $20 Pet Rent per animal as specified on the addendum. There is no weight limit; however, aggressive breeds listed and any dog with a bite history are prohibited. Akita, American Strafford Terrier, Bull Terrier, Bullmastiff, Chow Chow, Dingo, Doberman Pinscher, Giant Schnauzer, Mastiff, Ovtcharka, Presa Canario, Pit Bull, Rhodesian Ridgeback, Rottweiler, Neapolitan Mastiff and Wolf. Any mixed breeds that have the predominant characteristics of any of the above breeds are also prohibited. PETSCREENING IS A PART OF THE APPLICATION PROCESS FOR ALL APPLICANTS. To help ensure all of our residents understand our pet and animal-related policies, we use a third-party screening service and require everyone to complete a pet profile, a "No Pet/Animal" profile, or request accommodation for an assistance animal. All household pets must maintain an active PetScreening profile at an annual cost of $30 per pet.
